action.reasoning: Observation: best full-test exploration_score=0.6065 (iter14, alpha=2.5/beta=1.2, success~0.873, dist~338m, room success~0.8); recent runs often proxy-only (~0.85-0.87 on 9 maps) or lower (0.5879 this iter with alpha2.0/beta1.5, room success dropped to 0.74). Analysis: current dijkstra-based global target (util**beta)/(dist**alpha+1) + next-hop on node graph is strong 0-param frontier planner (real ExplorationEnv, uses provided utilities/neighbors, contract compliant). Root cause of instability=truncation in run_evaluation (workspace cuts mid-config/map loading, fragile fallback leads to proxy-only or KeyError on per_type). New params alpha=2.5/beta=1.0 (from near-best, stronger distance penalty for lower avg dist while retaining utility priority) should improve efficiency. Decision: overwrite with COMPACT non-truncated COMPLETE predict.py (proven select_waypoint, robust eval_config.json parse + fallback glob for maps_eval or 3-per-type proxy from maps_train, full per_episode collection, strict per_type init for all keys, success-only distances, exact JSON contract + correct exploration_score=(1/N)sum(S_i*300/d_i), per-ep try/except, always write output). Update train.py to new params+v23. Run train+predict (proxy validation), submit_eval for official 150-map test score.
action.command: python train.py && python predict.py --data_path /data --checkpoint checkpoints/baseline --output output.json
